title: StateVectorResponse
description: Response object from the OpenSky Network REST API state vector endpoints containing time and an array of aircraft state vectors.

time.description: The time which the state vectors in this response are associated with. All vectors represent the state of a vehicle within the interval [time-1, time].

states.description: The state vectors as a two-dimensional array. Each row represents a state vector with 18 indexed fields. Is null if no states are available.

StateVector.title: StateVector
StateVector.description: A single aircraft state vector containing 18 indexed fields representing the aircraft's current state.

prefixItems.title: icao24
prefixItems.description: Unique ICAO 24-bit address of the transponder in lower-case hex string representation.

prefixItems.title: callsign
prefixItems.description: Callsign of the vehicle (8 chars). Can be null if no callsign has been received.

prefixItems.title: origin_country
prefixItems.description: Country name inferred from the ICAO 24-bit address.

prefixItems.title: time_position
prefixItems.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) for the last position update. Can be null if no position report was received by OpenSky within the past 15 seconds.

prefixItems.title: last_contact
prefixItems.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) for the last update in general. Updated for any new valid message received from the transponder.

prefixItems.title: longitude
prefixItems.description: WGS-84 longitude in decimal degrees. Can be null.

prefixItems.title: latitude
prefixItems.description: WGS-84 latitude in decimal degrees. Can be null.

prefixItems.title: baro_altitude
prefixItems.description: Barometric altitude in meters. Can be null.

prefixItems.title: on_ground
prefixItems.description: Boolean value which indicates if the position was retrieved from a surface position report.

prefixItems.title: velocity
prefixItems.description: Velocity over ground in m/s. Can be null.

prefixItems.title: true_track
prefixItems.description: True track in decimal degrees clockwise from north (north=0 degrees). Can be null.

prefixItems.title: vertical_rate
prefixItems.description: Vertical rate in m/s. Positive value indicates climbing, negative value indicates descending. Can be null.

prefixItems.title: sensors
prefixItems.description: IDs of the receivers which contributed to this state vector. Is null if no filtering for sensor was used in the request.

prefixItems.title: geo_altitude
prefixItems.description: Geometric altitude in meters. Can be null.

prefixItems.title: squawk
prefixItems.description: The transponder code aka Squawk. Can be null.

prefixItems.title: spi
prefixItems.description: Whether flight status indicates special purpose indicator.

prefixItems.title: category
prefixItems.description: Aircraft category. 0=No information, 1=No ADS-B Emitter Category Info, 2=Light, 3=Small, 4=Large, 5=High Vortex Large, 6=Heavy, 7=High Performance, 8=Rotorcraft, 9=Glider, 10=Lighter-than-air, 11=Parachutist, 12=Ultralight, 13=Reserved, 14=UAV, 15=Space vehicle, 16=Surface Emergency, 17=Surface Service, 18=Point Obstacle, 19=Cluster Obstacle, 20=Line Obstacle.
